name: Backpropagation Training
description: Backpropagation trains a neural network by gradient descent: a forward pass computes the output and loss, then the loss gradient is propagated backward layer by layer via the chain rule to obtain per-parameter gradients; weights are updated and the cycle repeats over the data until the loss converges.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Neural network + loss"]
    N2["Forward pass per layer"]
    N3["Compute output + loss"]
    N4["Loss gradient at output"]
    N5["Apply chain rule back"]
    N6["Gradients per layer"]
    N7{"More layers upstream?"}
    N8["Propagate to prev layer"]
    N9["Update weights (GD)"]
    N10{"Converged / max epochs?"}
    N11["Repeat forward pass"]
    N12["Trained weights"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N8 -->|continue| N5
    N7 -->|no| N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 -->|no| N11
    N11 -->|epoch| N2
    N10 -->|yes| N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Learning representations by back-propagating errors
sources.authors: Rumelhart, D. E.; Hinton, G. E.; Williams, R. J.

sources.title: Deep Learning
sources.authors: Goodfellow, I.; Bengio, Y.; Courville, A.
